tasks.label: Dev: Start Infrastructure
tasks.detail: Start PostgreSQL + MinIO in Docker (waits for healthy)

tasks.label: Dev: Run Migrations
tasks.detail: Run Alembic database migrations

tasks.label: Dev: Prepare
tasks.detail: Start infrastructure and run migrations (used by debugger)

tasks.label: Dev: Setup Backend
tasks.detail: Create Python venv and install dependencies

tasks.label: Dev: Setup Frontend
tasks.detail: Install Node.js dependencies

tasks.label: Dev: Backend
tasks.detail: Start FastAPI with hot reload (no debugger)

tasks.label: Dev: Frontend
tasks.detail: Start Next.js dev server (no debugger)

tasks.label: Dev: Servers
tasks.detail: Start backend + frontend in parallel (separate terminals)

tasks.label: Dev: Start All
tasks.detail: Infrastructure + migrations + backend + frontend (no debugger)

tasks.label: Dev: Stop Infrastructure
tasks.detail: Stop PostgreSQL + MinIO containers

tasks.label: Docker: Deploy (Dev Build)
tasks.detail: Build from local code and start ALL services in Docker

tasks.label: Docker: Force Recreate
tasks.detail: Rebuild images and recreate all containers

tasks.label: Docker: Force Recreate (No Cache)
tasks.detail: Full clean rebuild — no layer cache, fresh containers
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --profile full build --no-cache && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --profile full up -d --force-recreate

tasks.label: Docker: Deploy (Production Images)
tasks.detail: Deploy using pre-built images from Docker Hub

tasks.label: Docker: Down
tasks.detail: Stop and remove all containers (keeps data)

tasks.label: Docker: Down + Volumes
tasks.detail: Stop containers and DELETE all data (database, files)

tasks.label: Docker: Logs
tasks.detail: Follow logs from all Docker services

tasks.label: Test: Backend
tasks.detail: Run pytest for the backend

tasks.label: Test: Frontend
tasks.detail: Run vitest for the frontend

tasks.label: Dev: Seed Demo Data
tasks.detail: Clean database and populate with realistic demo data (demo@familyvault.local / demo1234)
